issues.title: Fall back to the host CLI when the WSL distro lacks the agent
issues.suggested_reply: Hi @DDKinger, CI is failing on `check-spelling` — quick scan suggests it is reporting spelling/forbidden-pattern findings in this PR. Could you take a look at https://github.com/microsoft/intelligent-terminal/actions/runs/29178223927/job/86611191300#step:4:1? If it is flaky, push an empty commit (`git commit --allow-empty -m "ci: rerun"`) to re-run.

issues.title: Delegate ?<prompt>: npm .cmd-shim agents drop multi-line ## Terminal Context enrichment on the host launch path
issues.suggested_reply:
Hi @DDKinger, could you share which **Intelligent Terminal version**
you're on? You can find it in the **About** dialog (menu "V" button →
About at the bottom). The **Windows build number** is also helpful —
run `ver` or `[Environment]::OSVersion` in a shell.

This helps us tell whether it's already fixed in a newer build.
